segments.speaker: LAWYER
segments.text: Before we go on — was there any witness to the agreement, anyone else present?

segments.speaker: CLIENT
segments.text: Yes, my business partner Dana was there the whole time and can confirm what was promised.

segments.speaker: LAWYER
segments.text: Have you tried to resolve this with Trellis yourself?

segments.speaker: CLIENT
segments.text: I emailed them twice and left a voicemail asking them to finish the site or refund me, but they never replied.

segments.speaker: CLIENT
segments.text: And I checked — we did sign a short contract by email on March 8th, so it was in writing.
